notes: v367 — EVERYTHING COMBINED. Two streams of fixes were being made in parallel and the GitHub uploads had been overwriting one with the other — v367 merges BOTH so nothing is lost, and updates now push straight to GitHub again. FROM THE AUTO-PILOT DEEP AUDIT (v366): 11 real bugs fixed — the intraday fill engine was dead (🎣 dip orders never filled on an intraday dip; market buys filled at the close, not the promised next-day open), background engines could overwrite each other's account saves, trailing stops fabricated phantom stop-outs dated in the past, 🔁 repeat-pick stop-out pause never engaged after a win, ⏱ max-hold exits fired late at the wrong price, 🎯 picks could hit the wrong account, $0 quotes could mint free shares, 🎣100% corrupted cash, undo leaked a fee, pending orders showed a false 'corrupted' warning, withdrawals wrecked the return %. REPORT CARD made honest: edges measured from the next day's close (no more counting the untradeable overnight gap), one count per 5-day episode, matched volume maths, split artefacts clamped, no SOLID badge for wrong-direction flags — tiers will DROP; that's truth, not breakage. NEW RISK FEATURES: 🌏 regime gate (no buys while the index is below its 50-day average), 🎲 risk-per-trade sizing (~1% of account at risk per trade), 🧊 5-day stopped-out cooldown. 🏆 Best-practice sets them — re-tap and Save. FROM THE PORTFOLIO-TOOLS STREAM (previously wiped by an upload, now restored): ↩ SAFE UNDO with a cash gate (can't drive your balance negative) + Undo buttons on history rows, trade find that survives account switches and shifted sell-dates, 🧮 'fix fees' one-tap repair (resets Fees Paid to what your trades actually add up to and returns over-charged money to cash), and 💾 Backup now saves BOTH 👤 and 🤖 accounts and restores each to its own slot. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to load v367.
